entries.description: Registered S1; read Set 072 change-log + strategy §8, Set 073 §9 + cross-target-comparison, design-consensus-synthesis + both raw consults; confirmed audit table (platform >=0.1.0, harvester >=0.15.0, migration-orchestrator >=0.10.0) against live repos; confirmed verification_only_app CLI matches addendum template.

Authored docs/greenfield-matrix-protocol.md via routed documentation task (gemini-pro); auto-verify caught a cohort-table fidelity Major, fixed; corrected invented anchor links, de-anachronized metadata example, added provider-x-surface arm scoring-unit clarification.

Finalized ai_router/prompt-templates/greenfield-matrix-addendum.md (reusable instruction block) and routed docs/greenfield-adjudication-rubric.md (TP/FP/dup/unclear defs + per-arm scoring table); tightened arm-vs-cell terminology + removed a non-roster example row.

Created telemetry/ skeleton: telemetry/README.md (D5 layout + required metadata.json contract + cohort), and per-repo placeholders for dabbler-platform (lead) and dabbler-access-harvester (supporting). migration-orchestrator excluded (D4), no dir.

routed_gate REQUIRED (cross-artifact + multi-module + breadth 9); cross-provider session-verification (openai/gpt-5.4) converged VERIFIED over 4 substantive rounds (R1 2 Major+1 Minor; R2 2 new; R3 1 terminology Major; R4 clean) -- each round a real fix, no churn. Wrote disposition.json (verdict VERIFIED), s1-next-session.md, cited 11 lessons. Ready to commit+push+close (non-final).
Registered S2 (claude/anthropic/opus-4-8, high); read S1 protocol+addendum+rubric, project-guidance, lessons-learned, workflow; confirmed both pilot sets + venvs exist.

Enabled dabbler-platform (LEAD): requirements.txt router pin >=0.1.0->=0.26.0 + greenfield-matrix-addendum wired into CLAUDE/AGENTS/GEMINI; venv upgraded 0.10.0->0.26.1; verification_only_app CLI confirmed parsing addendum args. Committed+pushed aac874e.
Enabled dabbler-access-harvester (SUPPORTING): pin >=0.15.0->=0.26.0 + addendum wired in; venv 0.18.0->0.26.1; CLI confirmed. Committed+pushed a70c023.

Recorded migration-orchestrator deferral (doc-only, excluded; optional pull-only sidecar tagged includedInFindingPower=false) as a one-line note in its CLAUDE/AGENTS/GEMINI. Committed+pushed f7547a4 (disambiguated 7856089).

Added SECTION 10 to verification-surface-strategy.md (routed draft via route(documentation)): pilot live; relative-yield-not-recall; cohort lead/supporting/deferred; 2 validity threats+mitigations; held decisions stay held; synthesis is a future set.

Wrote change-log.md (both sessions); authored lesson L-075-1 (pin bump != enablement until venv upgraded + entrypoint confirmed); routed next-SET rec -> s2-next-set.md (076-seeded-recall-calibration-lane primary, fallback WAIT->synthesis).

routed_gate REQUIRED (breadth 4). Cross-provider session-verification (openai/gpt-5.4, cross-provider from anthropic) VERIFIED + 2 Minors (non-blocking L-071-1) BOTH fixed. Advisory dogfood (openai+google, L-070-1): google VERIFIED/0; openai 1 Major = expected pre-close ordering artifact, resolved by close, converged no-new-code. disposition.json verdict VERIFIED; cited lessons.
